message.name: SAFENAV_HEARTBEAT
message.field: Timestamp (time since system boot).
Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Message counter to detect missed messages
Safenav midwater avoidance function health
Safenav anti-ground function health
Safenav safe-surfacing function health
Safenav subsurface collision status
Safenav safe-surfacing collision status
Distance from ownship to nearest obstacle in metres
Distance from left-hand loiter position to nearest obstacle in metres
Distance from right-hand loiter position to nearest obstacle in metres
Unique identifier for nominal route (0: None/invalid)
Unique identifier for safenav override route (0: None/invalid)
The waypoint index to re-enter the nominal route after performing a safenav override
Number of valid waypoints in the safe trajectory route, 0 for no/invalid route
Speed to traverse the safe trajectory at
Speed type to use for all waypoints
Vertical position type of all waypoints
Vertical rate type for vertical position change to next waypoint
Types of waypoint
Latitudes of safe trajectory waypoints in 1e-7 degrees
Longitudes of safe trajectory waypoints in 1e-7 degrees
Vertical positions of safe trajectory waypoint
Vertical rates for vertical position change to next waypoint
Turn radii for each waypoint

message.name: SAFENAV_HEARTBEAT_V2
message.field: Timestamp (time since system boot).
Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Message counter to detect missed messages
Safenav midwater avoidance function health
Safenav anti-ground function health
Safenav safe-surfacing function health
Safenav surface watchkeeping function health
Safenav collision status
Distance from ownship to nearest obstacle in metres
Distance from left-hand loiter position to nearest obstacle in metres
Distance from right-hand loiter position to nearest obstacle in metres
Unique identifier for nominal route (0: None/invalid)
Number of valid waypoints in the safe trajectory route, 0 for no/invalid route
Unique identifier for safenav override route (0: None/invalid)
The waypoint index to re-enter the nominal route after performing a safenav override
Speed to traverse the safe trajectory at
Speed type to use for all waypoints
Vertical position type of all waypoints
Vertical rate type for vertical position change to next waypoint
Types of waypoint
Latitudes of safe trajectory waypoints in 1e-7 degrees
Longitudes of safe trajectory waypoints in 1e-7 degrees
Vertical positions of safe trajectory waypoint
Vertical rates for vertical position change to next waypoint
Turn radii for each waypoint

message.name: SAFENAV_NOMINAL_WAYPOINT_SEGMENT
message.description: Nominal waypoint segment (segment if safenav override did not exist) (to, next, next next, ...)
message.field: Timestamp (time since system boot).
Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Unique identifier for nominal route (0: None/invalid)
Number of segment waypoints
Indices of waypoints in this segment
Type of waypoint
Latitude of waypoint in 1e-7 degrees
Longitude of waypoint in 1e-7 degrees
Vertical position of waypoint
Vertical position type of waypoint
Vertical rate for vertical position change to next waypoint
Vertical rate type for vertical position change to next waypoint
Speed to maintain until next waypoint
Speed type to use until next waypoint
Turn radius for waypoint
Hold time at waypoint

message.name: SAFENAV_NOMINAL_WAYPOINT_SEGMENT_V2
message.description: Nominal waypoint segment (segment if safenav override did not exist) (from, to, next, next next, ...)
message.field: Timestamp (time since system boot).
Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Unique identifier for nominal route as per the TO waypoint (0: None/invalid)
Number of segment waypoints (including the FROM waypoint)
Indices of waypoints in this segment
Type of waypoint
Latitude of waypoint in 1e-7 degrees
Longitude of waypoint in 1e-7 degrees
Vertical position of waypoint
Vertical position type of waypoint
Vertical rate for vertical position change to next waypoint
Vertical rate type for vertical position change to next waypoint
Speed to maintain until next waypoint
Speed type to use until next waypoint
Turn radius for waypoint
Hold time at waypoint
State of safenav subsurface authority
State of safenav surface authority
Depth at below which the vehicle is considered outside of the danger zone and safe from surface vessel collisions
Depth at which the vehicle is considered on the surface
Safety buffer for avoiding terrain
Distance from seafloor in which the vehicle is considered in collision with terrain
Current safenav zone in which the vehicle is operating
Waypoint attributes

message.name: SAFENAV_PASSIVE_ACOUSTIC_OBSERVATION
message.description: Observations from the passive acoustic array (hydrophones)
message.field: Timestamp (time since system boot).
Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Latitude of vehicle in 1e-7 degrees
Longitude of vehicle in 1e-7 degrees
Vertical position of vehicle
Vertical position type of waypoint
Vehicle orientation (FLUtoENU) quaternion w (1 in null-rotation)
Vehicle orientation (FLUtoENU) quaternion x (0 in null-rotation)
Vehicle orientation (FLUtoENU) quaternion y (0 in null-rotation)
Vehicle orientation (FLUtoENU) quaternion z (0 in null-rotation)
The number of observations in this message
mean azimuth angle to target, CCW from forward in FLU
azimuth angle standard deviation
elevation angle in radians
elevation angle standard deviation
Minimum detection frequency
Maximum detection frequency

message.name: SAFENAV_CV_TRACK_FRAME
message.description: CV Tracks From the Camera Setup
message.field: Timestamp that event occurred in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
camera UID.
Image width in pixels.
Image height in pixels.
horizontal fov in deg for this camera.
vertical fov in deg for this camera.
Latitude of vehicle in 1e-7 degrees
Longitude of vehicle in 1e-7 degrees
Vertical position of vehicle
Vehicle orientation (FLUtoENU) quaternion w (1 in null-rotation)
Vehicle orientation (FLUtoENU) quaternion x (0 in null-rotation)
Vehicle orientation (FLUtoENU) quaternion y (0 in null-rotation)
Vehicle orientation (FLUtoENU) quaternion z (0 in null-rotation)
Id of the track.
What is the status of this CVTrack
Bounding box in image relative coords, range [0,1]
Bounding box in image relative coords, range [0,1]
Bounding box in image relative coords, range [0,1]
Bounding box in image relative coords, range [0,1]
Bounding box rotation ccw deg
Score of the track divided to fit into an int
Meaning of altitude, e.g. WGS84, EGM96.

message.name: SAFENAV_TRACK_STATE
message.description: The estimated location and velocity of a tracked object
message.field: Timestamp in Coordinated Universal Time (ms since Epoch)
Status of track, describing if mature/verified/expired/etc.
Assigned class of object being tracked
ID of track
Latitude of track object in 1e-7 degrees
Longitude of track object in 1e-7 degrees
Vertical position of track object
Meaning of altitude, e.g. WGS84, EGM96.
Latitude of origin in 1e-7 degrees
Longitude of origin in 1e-7 degrees
Vertical position of origin
Meaning of altitude, e.g. WGS84, EGM96.
East component of East-North-Up (ENU) position
North component of East-North-Up (ENU) position
Up component of East-North-Up (ENU) position
East component of East-North-Up (ENU) velocity
North component of East-North-Up (ENU) velocity
Up component of East-North-Up (ENU) velocity
Covariance matrix position xx in upper-right triangle for ENU position
Covariance matrix position xy in upper-right triangle for ENU position
Covariance matrix position xz in upper-right triangle for ENU position
Covariance matrix position yy in upper-right triangle for ENU position
Covariance matrix position yz in upper-right triangle for ENU position
Covariance matrix position zz in upper-right triangle for ENU position
Covariance matrix position xx in upper-right triangle for ENU velocity
Covariance matrix position xy in upper-right triangle for ENU velocity
Covariance matrix position xz in upper-right triangle for ENU velocity
Covariance matrix position yy in upper-right triangle for ENU velocity
Covariance matrix position yz in upper-right triangle for ENU velocity
Covariance matrix position zz in upper-right triangle for ENU velocity
